name: Cherry-Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cream cheese, vanilla, lemon juice, and condensed milk until well combined and no lumps remain.
2. Pour half of the mixture into each pie crust. Refrigerate for 1 hour to allow it to firm up.
3. Fill the top halves of the pie crusts with cherries. Refrigerate for another hour.
4. Serve cold.
